---
title: "Resume"
page-layout: full
---

# Briana Maximino  

Los Angeles, CA  
(323) 568-7781  
brianamaximino1@gmail.com  
[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/brianamaximino)

---

## Education  

**California State Polytechnic University, Pomona**  
Bachelor of Science in Business Administration – Marketing  
Expected Graduation: 2027  
GPA: 3.6  
Dean’s List: Fall 2024, Spring 2025  

**John C. Fremont STEAM Magnet High School**  
High School Diploma, 2023  
Honors Graduate (3.9 GPA)  
Jaime Escalante Math Program  

---

## Work Experience  

**GAP Factory — Sales Associate / Customer Service**  
Los Angeles, CA | Oct 2024 – Present  

- Assist 40+ customers per shift, improving overall shopping experience through product knowledge and service support  
- Support store operations during peak traffic, helping maintain efficient customer flow and reduced wait times  
- Maintain merchandising displays aligned with company standards, reducing misplaced inventory by 25%  
- Drive sales performance by promoting offers and upselling complementary products  

**Dollar Tree — Cashier / Stock Associate**  
Los Angeles, CA | Sept 2023 – Feb 2024  

- Reduced average checkout wait time by 15% through efficient transaction handling  
- Supported daily store operations in a fast-paced retail environment  
- Maintained visual merchandising standards and inventory organization  

**Student2Student Program — Peer Tutor & Mentor**  
Los Angeles, CA | Sept 2022 – Jul 2023  

- Delivered individualized tutoring sessions in math and reading for elementary and middle school students  
- Created supportive learning environments that improved student academic performance  
- Facilitated small group instruction tailored to different learning styles  

---

## Leadership & Activities  

**Girls Soccer Team — Team Member**  
John C. Fremont HS | 2019 – 2023  

- Participated in 100+ practices and 40+ games across four seasons  
- Supported team collaboration and communication during competitions  
- Demonstrated strong time management balancing academics and athletics  

**Just Keep Livin Program (JKL)**  
Participant | 2019 – 2023  

- Attended weekly leadership and wellness workshops  
- Facilitated peer discussions and group activities  
- Completed community service and self-development projects  

---

## Skills  

Marketing Analytics  
Market Research  
Content Marketing  
Social Media Strategy  
Google Analytics 4  
Excel (Pivot Tables)  
Power BI (Beginner)  
Bilingual: English & Spanish  

---

## Certifications  

Google Analytics 4 Certification — Google Digital Academy  
Feb 2026 – Feb 2027  

Power BI Essential Training — LinkedIn Learning  
Feb 2026  

Excel PivotTables in Depth — LinkedIn Learning  
Jan 2026  

Project Management Foundations — LinkedIn Learning  
Feb 2025  

---

## Relevant Coursework  

Marketing Research  
Marketing Analytics  
Consumer Behavior  
Digital Marketing  
Business Statistics  

## Download Resume  

<a href="images/Final Resume.pdf" class="btn btn-primary">Download PDF Resume</a>
